scripts.dev:backend-order: cd order-cart-service && cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11" mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run
scripts.dev:backend-payment: cd payment-notification-service && cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11" mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run
scripts.dev:backend-auth: cd auth-user-service && cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11" mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run
scripts.dev: npm run dev:databases && concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend-order" "npm run dev:backend-payment" "npm run dev:backend-auth"
